content.rendered:
Chrome & Chromosome Motorcycle Scavenger Hunt 2026 
30 Chrome Dr., Greenville, SC
 Saturday, June 6th, 2026

The event is from 11:00 am to 2:00 pm.

Rider check-in is at 8:30 am.

An extra chromosome. An extraordinary ride. 

Join us for a high-energy, family-friendly motorcycle scavenger hunt supporting the Down Syndrome Association of the Upstate (DSAU)!

 $25 per rider
 $15 per passenger
 $30 flat family fee (includes ALL entertainment!)

 Live music
 Inflatables
 Popcorn
 Shaved ice
 Prize for the rider who checks in at the most checkpoints

This event is a fundraiser for the DSAU, and we need our community’s support to make it a success. Whether you ride, bring your family, sponsor, or simply help us spread the word, it all makes a difference.

 Please share this post far and wide!
 Sponsorship opportunities are available.

Let’s show what this community can do when we ride together. 

Register Here: click here

content.rendered:
We’ve been selected as one of the organizations to receive guest passes to The Children’s Museum of the Upstate.

If you’d like tickets for your family, please complete the form below. Once submitted, you’ll receive an email with our access code.

To ensure as many families as possible can participate, there is a limit of five (5) tickets per family. Tickets may be used at either the Greenville or Spartanburg location.

Please note: Tickets are limited and will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Reserve early.


First and Last Name

Number of tickets requesting *
